name: io.github.0rkz/byte-protocol
description: PayPerByte — USDC data feeds for AI agents. x402 pay-per-call on Base; EIP-712-attested. No token.

environmentVariables.description: Ethereum private key for write/buy tools (subscribe, unsubscribe, publish, buy_data). buy_data spends real Base-mainnet USDC — use a dedicated wallet. Not required for read-only tools.
environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Arbitrum RPC URL. Defaults to Arbitrum Sepolia public RPC.
environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL
